'''dhagocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabuto|kabuto]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabuto|kabuto]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhagocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægecheth|dhægecheth]] || [[word:dhægechej|dhægechej]] || [[word:dhægechesh|dhægechesh]] || [[word:dhægeche|dhægeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagogochoth|dhagogochoth]] || [[word:dhagogochoj|dhagogochoj]] || [[word:dhagogochosh|dhagogochosh]] || [[word:dhagogocho|dhagogocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagochoth|dhagochoth]] || [[word:dhagochoj|dhagochoj]] || [[word:dhagochosh|dhagochosh]] || [[word:dhagocho|dhagocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagofchoth|dhagofchoth]] || [[word:dhagofchoj|dhagofchoj]] || [[word:dhagofchosh|dhagofchosh]] || [[word:dhagofchof|dhagofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhagochotho|dhagochotho]] || [[word:dhagochojo|dhagochojo]] || [[word:dhagochosho|dhagochosho]] || [[word:dhagochoko|dhagochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhagochoth|dhagochoth]] || [[word:dhagochoj|dhagochoj]] || [[word:dhagochosh|dhagochosh]] || [[word:dhagocho|dhagocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhagochothol|dhagochothol]] || [[word:dhagochojol|dhagochojol]] || [[word:dhagochoshol|dhagochoshol]] || [[word:dhagochokol|dhagochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhagochothotho|dhagochothotho]] || [[word:dhagochojojo|dhagochojojo]] || [[word:dhagochoshosho|dhagochoshosho]] || [[word:dhagochoko|dhagochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhagochothon|dhagochothon]] || [[word:dhagochojon|dhagochojon]] || [[word:dhagochoshon|dhagochoshon]] || [[word:dhagochokon|dhagochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhagochothoro|dhagochothoro]] || [[word:dhagochojoro|dhagochojoro]] || [[word:dhagochoshoro|dhagochoshoro]] || [[word:dhagochokoro|dhagochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
